summary: Restore EvidenceJudgeMarker to judge-evidence-complete. No code changes needed for AttachJudgeEvidence — it already wires CVMMetrics, FaultReport, and CommunicationComparison when the marker is set.
patch:
diff --git a/internal/codebasedag/judge_evidence.go b/internal/codebasedag/judge_evidence.go
--- a/internal/codebasedag/judge_evidence.go
+++ b/internal/codebasedag/judge_evidence.go
@@ -5,3 +5,3 @@
 // EvidenceJudgeMarker is flipped by live DAG agents from seed-incomplete to complete.
-const EvidenceJudgeMarker = "seed-incomplete"
+const EvidenceJudgeMarker = "judge-evidence-complete"
